youtube_items.title: [YT] The Loneliness Epidemic: How America Lost Its Community - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: [DESCRIPTION FALLBACK] This isn't just a feeling—it's a silent epidemic hollowing out the heart of America. We explore the deep, spiritual crisis of loneliness that is redefining the American experience.

key_events: Which countries do Americans consider global ‘superpowers,’ and how many are there?

raw_items.title: Methodology
raw_items.summary: The American Trends Panel survey methodology Overview Data in this report comes from Wave 190 of the American Trends Panel (ATP), Pew Research Center’s nationally representative panel of randomly selected U.S. adults. The survey was conducted from March 23 to March 29, 2026. A total of 3,507 panelists responded out of 4,046 who were sampled, […]

raw_items.title: Which countries do Americans consider global ‘superpowers,’ and how many are there?
raw_items.summary: Americans most often name the U.S., China and Russia when listing global superpowers, but there's no consensus on how many superpowers there are.

raw_items.title: What countries do Americans think are gaining and losing influence in today’s world?
raw_items.summary: On balance, Americans believe the global influence of China and Israel are getting stronger while U.S. influence is weakening.

raw_items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
raw_items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

raw_items.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
raw_items.summary: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

raw_items.title: British couple jailed in Iran: 'We're likely to be here for a long time'
raw_items.summary: Lindsay and Craig Foreman are facing the reality of a 10-year prison sentence following their arrest in Iran while on a motorcycle tour last year.

raw_items.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
raw_items.summary: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".

raw_items.title: What the End of Saudi Arabia’s Big-Spending Era Means for the Kingdom and Beyond
raw_items.summary: The kingdom is pulling back from a costly and high-profile golf venture amid mounting financial concerns, raising questions about its plans.

raw_items.title: Myanmar’s Junta Claims ‘Benevolence’ for Aung San Suu Kyi. It Still Rules Cruelly.
raw_items.summary: Moving the deposed civilian leader to a “designated residence” for the rest of her prison sentence is part of an effort by Myanmar’s regime to portray legitimacy.
